arrivee_ville.title: The City of Smiles
arrivee_ville.text:
You're coming into town with Aikito.

It's beautiful.

The houses are pretty.
People are dressed with care.

But something is weird.

Everyone smiles.

The lady wearing too heavy bags. Smile.
The gentleman whose bike is flat. Smile.
The little girl who just fell. Smile.

Aikito sits next to you.

He leans his head on the side.

**"These smiles don't go to the eye. *

affiche_cirque.title: The Poster
affiche_cirque.text:
In the center of the square, a large poster announces:

** THE GRAND CIRQUE IS INVOLVED**
*Where everyone is always happy*
* Tonight and every night*

Golden stars everywhere.
Faces that smile on the poster.

A man in high form distributes tickets.

He smiles too.
Very strong.
Too loud.

Aikito sniffs the ticket.

**"It smells like paper and sadness. *

choices.text: Ask the man what this circus is.

homme_billet.title: The Man at Tickets
homme_billet.text:
The man looks at you with his big smile.

**« At Grand Cirque Perfect, everyone is happy! *
**"No tears. No anger. No sadness. *
**"All happiness! *

He says that very quickly.
Like he's reciting a lesson.

You notice his hands are shaking a little.
When he gives you the ticket.

Aikito looks him in the eye.

Man turns his eyes away.

choices.text: Take the ticket and come in.
Ask why his hands are shaking.

mains_tremblantes.title: The Tremblant Hands
mains_tremblantes.text:
Man stops smiling for a second.

Just a second.

**"I... I don't tremble. *

He starts smiling very quickly.

**"It's all very well! Come in, come in! *

But you saw.
Aikito saw too.

He gives you a little snout in your hand.

**"He's afraid of something. *

entree_cirque.title: Circus Entry
entree_cirque.text:
The capital is large and red.

Golden lights everywhere.
Joyful music that plays very hard.

People inside all smile.
They're watching the lead.
They applaud.

But nobody talks.
Nobody really laughs.

Just applause.
And smiles.

Aikito sticks his ears back.

**"Too much noise. Not enough joy. *

observer_public.title: The public
observer_public.text:
You sit in the stands.

The little girl next to you smiles.
But his eyes are red.
She cried before she came in.

The man behind you smiles.
But he's always waking.

The lady in front of you smiles.
But she looks at her shoes.

You lean towards the little girl.

**"You okay? *

She's looking at you, surprise.

No one had asked him that question for a long time.

choices.text: Go see the artists behind the scenes.

petite_fille.title: Little Girl
petite_fille.text:
The little girl looks around her.

Then she whispers very loud.

**"I don't want to smile today. *
**"But if I don't smile, the Director is angry. *
**"And if the Director is angry, everyone is angry. *

Aikito slowly approaches her.

He puts his head on his knees.

She's looking at him.

And for the first time,
She's really smiling.

Just a little bit.
But for real.

choices.text: Go see why the Director does this.

clown_coulisses.title: The Clown
clown_coulisses.text:
Behind the red curtain, you find a clown.

He's sitting on the floor.
His orange wig's all wrong.

He laughs.

He keeps laughing.

But his eyes don't laugh at all.

**"Ha ha ha ha... I can't stop... ha ha..."**

Aikito sits in front of him.
Very quiet.
He's waiting.

The clown is watching him.
And stop for a second.

**"You don't smile. *
**"That's good. *

choices.text: Sit next to him in silence.

secret_clown.title: The Secret of the Clown
secret_clown.text:
The clown lowers his voice.

**"The Director says if you stop smiling..."**
**" ...people won't like the show. *
**"What if people don't like..."**
**"...we'll be more at the circus. *

He looks at his big shoes.

**"Then I smile. *
**"Even when my stomach hurts. *
**"Even when I'm tired. *
**"Even when I want to cry. *

Aikito licks his hand.

**"Your belly knows the truth. *

trapeziste.title: Trapist
trapeziste.text:
You climb a few steps.

Upstairs, a young woman sits on her swing.
She smiles down.

But his legs tremble.

**"I'm afraid of emptiness.** she says softly.
**"Always. *

**" But the Director says a smiling artist"**
**" gives confidence to the public. *

Aikito barks once.
Easy.

She's looking at him.

**"He's not afraid to tell the truth, eh. *

coulisses.title: Behind the scenes
coulisses.text:
You're going behind the scenes.

Everywhere, artists smiling around.
But they stop as soon as they think nobody looks at them.

A juggler that frowns the eyebrows.
A sighing acrobat.
A musician stretching his shoulders.

Their real faces last two seconds.
Then the smile comes back.

Like a mask we put on.

Aikito is looking at you.

**"They forgot that masks are tiring. *

bureau_directeur.title: Office of the Director
bureau_directeur.text:
The Director is a tall man with a mustache.

He welcomes you with the greatest smile you've ever seen.

**"Welcome! It's all right here! *
**"All happiness! All joy! *

You look around.

There's a picture on his desk.
An old circus.
People who really laugh.

Some have tears in their eyes so much they laugh.

The Director notices you're looking at the picture.

Her smile shakes for a minute.

choices.text: "Why does everyone have to smile here? »

photo_directeur.title: The Photo
photo_directeur.text:
The Director takes the picture.

He looks at her a long time.

**"It was... my old circus. *

His voice changes.
Softer. Truer.

**"People really laughed. Crying sometimes. *
**"Afraid. Were surprised. *
**"All emotions. *

He's resting the picture.

**"But one night, nobody came. *
**"And I was afraid it was because they were not happy. *
**"Then I decided that everyone would always be happy. *

Aikito lays his foot on the director's foot.

**"You were afraid. * You say softly.
**"Then you put a mask on everyone. *

question_directeur.title: The Question
question_directeur.text:
The Director stops.

Her big smile is shaking.

**"Because... because people come to be happy! *

**"And if the artists are sad, people will be sad. *
**"And if people are sad, they won't come back. *

He says that very quickly.
Like it's urgent.

Aikito sits down.
He's just yapping.
Quietly.

The Director's looking at him.

**"He doesn't look happy..."**
**"And yet I want to caress him. *

choices.text: " Exactly. We love the real ones. »

grand_moment.title: Truth
grand_moment.text:
The Director remains silent.

Long time.

Aikito will lie on his feet.

The Director's looking at him.
Then he looks at you.

**" People came that night..."**
**"...even if it wasn't perfect. *

He's looking at the picture again.

**"Maybe I was afraid of nothing. *

He gets up slowly.
He's taking off his top.

Below, her hair is crazy.

He smiles.

Not his big smile.

A little tired smile.
But true.

scene_finale.title: On Scene
scene_finale.text:
The director's on stage.

He takes off his big, forced smile.

He's talking to the public.

**" Tonight... you have the right to be as you are. *

Quiet.

Then the little girl in the stands said:
**"I was sad earlier. *

Someone else says:
**"I was tired. *

And then everyone starts talking.
Of their real days.
Their real emotions.

And something strange is happening.

They're smiling.

Really.

Aikito moves the tail.

fin_principale.title: End — The True Cirque
fin_principale.text:
The clown takes off his painted smile.

Below, he smiles anyway.
But for real this time.

The trapezist jumps.
She's still scared.
But she screams jumping.

A real scream.
And people applaud even louder.

When you leave, the little girl catches up with you.

**"Thank you.** she says.
**"I was never told it was normal to be sad. *

Aikito looks at her.

**"Emotions are like the weather. *
**"They change. *
**"That's what's good. *

You hate your head.

Tonight, the circus is imperfect.

And that's why he's beautiful.

fin_clown_libre.title: End — The Laughter of the Clown
fin_clown_libre.text:
The clown takes off his makeup.

He has a normal face.
With wrinkles from someone who laughed and cried.

He's looking at you.

**"I forgot how to do it. *
**"Laugh for real. *

He's trying.

A little laugh.
A little rusty.

Then a bigger one.

Aikito barks with joy.

Tonight, the clown really laughs for the first time in a long time.

And it's the best number in the circus.

fin_trapeziste_libre.title: End — The Cree of Trapeziste
fin_trapeziste_libre.text:
The trapezist goes up.

She's shaking.

She's jumping.

And this time she screams.
A real cry from someone who's afraid
And still jumps.

The audience is silent.

Then someone applauds.

Then everyone.

She's landing.
Tears in the eyes.

**"It was better..."** she said.

Aikito's back in line.

Being afraid and showing it,
It's braver than pretending.

fin_partir.title: End — The Path of Return
fin_partir.text:
You didn't find the director.

But when you get out of the circus,
You meet the clown.

He doesn't laugh anymore.

He looks at the sky.

**"Beautiful night. * he says.

**"Yes.** you answer.

You stay here for a minute.
No smile.
Not pretending.

Just two people looking at the sky.

Aikito sits between you.

Sometimes,
one minute real
Better than an hour of pretending.
